name: Bone Biologics Corp
business: Bone Biologics Corp is a clinical-stage medical device company focused on bone regeneration in spinal fusion using the recombinant human protein NELL-1. Its lead product candidate, NB1, combines NELL-1 with demineralized bone matrix (DBM) to provide target-specific control over bone regeneration, initially for lumbar spinal fusion. The product is regulated as a device/drug combination and requires FDA pre-market approval before commercialization.

exposures.sentence: We are a medical device company that is currently focused on bone regeneration in spinal fusion using the recombinant human protein known as NELL-1.

catalysts.event: First subjects treated in pilot clinical study of NB1 bone graft device
catalysts.sentence: During 2024, we announced the treatment of the first subjects in the multicenter, prospective, randomized pilot clinical study of our NB1 bone graft device.

catalysts.event: Completion of pilot clinical trial 12 months after enrolling the 30th patient
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate completing the trial 12 months after enrolling the 30th patient.

catalysts.event: Submission of investigational device exemption (IDE) approximately 12 months after enrolling the 30th subject
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate submitting an IDE approximately 12 months after enrolling the 30th subject.

tamClaims.claim: The global bone graft substitute market presents a $3 billion opportunity.
tamClaims.sentence: The global bone graft substitute market presents a $3 billion opportunity per Fortune Business Insights.

tamClaims.claim: The non-union trauma market presents an $8 billion global opportunity.
tamClaims.sentence: addressing this $8 billion global market opportunity per Fortune Business Insights.

tamClaims.claim: The global osteoporosis market presents an $11.2 billion opportunity.
tamClaims.sentence: The global osteoporosis market presents an $11.2 billion opportunity per Evercore analyst reports.
